testcase.name: test_emergency_assess_bengaluru

failure.message: AssertionError: No OSM facilities returned: {'hospitals': [], 'clinics': [], 'pharmacies': []} assert ((0 + 0) + 0) > 0 + where 0 = len([]) + where [] = <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfef436782600>('hospitals', []) + where <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfef436782600> = {'clinics': [], 'hospitals': [], 'pharmacies': []}.get + and 0 = len([]) + where [] = <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfef436782600>('clinics', []) + where <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfef436782600> = {'clinics': [], 'hospitals': [], 'pharmacies': []}.get + and 0 = len([]) + where [] = <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfef436782600>('pharmacies', []) + where <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfef436782600> = {'clinics': [], 'hospitals': [], 'pharmacies': []}.get

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_mediguard_backend.py:202: in test_emergency_assess_bengaluru assert (len(fac.get("hospitals", [])) + len(fac.get("clinics", [])) + len(fac.get("pharmacies", []))) > 0, \ E AssertionError: No OSM facilities returned: {'hospitals': [], 'clinics': [], 'pharmacies': []} E assert ((0 + 0) + 0) > 0 E + where 0 = len([]) E + where [] = <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfef436782600>('hospitals', []) E + where <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfef436782600> = {'clinics': [], 'hospitals': [], 'pharmacies': []}.get E + and 0 = len([]) E + where [] = <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfef436782600>('clinics', []) E + where <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfef436782600> = {'clinics': [], 'hospitals': [], 'pharmacies': []}.get E + and 0 = len([]) E + where [] = <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfef436782600>('pharmacies', []) E + where <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfef436782600> = {'clinics': [], 'hospitals': [], 'pharmacies': []}.get
